title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with an OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and async library for interacting with the Ollama server; supports chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embedders for use in LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed ‘Open WebUI’); offers model switching, code highlighting, RAG, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, written in Node.js; supports conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style code-completion plugin that uses Ollama models locally instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation pipeline combining Ollama embeddings, Chroma vector store, and LangChain.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embed operations.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with Tokio and serde.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that adds Ollama-powered code explanation, generation, and chat buffers inside the editor.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Quick Streamlit chat UI that connects to a local Ollama instance for model selection and streaming conversations.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django REST API wrapper around Ollama that exposes chat and embed endpoints with API-key authentication.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds CORS, rate-limiting, and token auth in front of the Ollama server.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop chat client built with Qt6 and C++ that talks to Ollama over HTTP.

title: ollama-rust-embeddings
summary: Rust binary that uses ollama-rs to generate sentence embeddings and store them in Qdrant for fast similarity search.

title: ollama-kotlin-android
summary: Android library and sample app demonstrating how to chat with Ollama models from Kotlin using Retrofit.

title: ollama-models-hub
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantized GGUFs ready to import into Ollama.
